creator: areilly@bigpond.net.au
text:
The PLT group has released a new version (4.1.2).  This is an update to track that new version.

Fix: The fix was a shar-encoded archive of the port, but that was rejected as possible spam by command-line send-pr.  I can't attach that to the web form either, because that has a 100k limit, but the port is 620k.  So here's a uuencoded (because the form requires text) gzipped diff of the new port against the old (the raw diff is more than 100k too).  If the committer who sees this would like the original shar I can send it to them, of course.  If someone could suggest a less circuitous mechanism for submitting these updates, that'd be cool, too.

Cheers,

Andrew

Patch attached with submission follows:
